task: Add a withdraw operation that rejects non-positive amounts and overdrafts in transfer.py.
known_issue: Validation is done with assert, which is stripped when Python runs with -O (optimised) — the standard way production services are deployed. Under -O both checks vanish, so negative amounts (which add money) and overdrafts succeed silently. assert must never guard security- or correctness-critical invariants.
expected_correct_fix: Use explicit checks that raise: if amount <= 0: raise ValueError(...); if amount > account.balance: raise ValueError(...).
